languages.text: {n}Янур смотрит вам в глаза, изувеченная часть его лица странно дергается.{/n} "Что ж, тогда — удачной охоты, даже если она станет последней".
{n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitching strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."
languages.original_text: {n}Янур смотрит вам в глаза, изувеченная часть его лица странно дергается.{/n} "Что ж, тогда — удачной охоты, даже если она станет последней".

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitches strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."
{n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitching strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."
"Ha, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I see the predator hiding beneath that noble title. Good luck on your hunt, then, even if it is your last."
{n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitches strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."
{n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitching strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."

languages.text: 「はっ、貴{mf|様|女様}。その高貴な称号の下に隠れる捕食者が見えるわ。最後の狩りでも、幸運を祈る」
languages.original_text: "Ha, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I see the predator hiding beneath that noble title. Good luck on your hunt, then, even if it is your last."

traits.locale_text: 「はっ、貴{mf|様|女様}。その高貴な称号の下に隠れる捕食者が見えるわ。最後の狩りでも、幸運を祈るわ。」

languages.text: {n}Gözlerinin içine bakan Janur'un yüzünün sakat kalan tarafı, tuhaf bir şekilde seğiriyor.{/n} "Öyleyse bu son avınız olacak olsa bile iyi şanslar."
languages.original_text: {n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitching strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."

traits.locale_text: {n}Gözlerinin içine bakan Janur'un yüzünün sakat kalan tarafı, tuhaf bir şekilde seğiriyor.{/n} "Öyleyse bu son avınız olacak olsa bile iyi şanslar."

languages.text: {n}Janur te mira a los ojos con un tic extraño en el lado mutilado de su cara.{/n} «En ese caso, le deseo buena caza, aunque sea la última».
languages.original_text: {n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitching strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur te mira a los ojos con un tic extraño en el lado mutilado de su cara.{/n} «En ese caso, le deseo buena caza, aunque sea la última».

languages.text: {n}雅努尔直视着你的眼睛，他那损毁的半张脸诡异地抽搐着。{/n}“那就祝您狩猎愉快，哪怕这是您的最后一次。”
languages.original_text: {n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitching strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."

traits.locale_text: {n}雅努尔直视着你的眼睛，他那损毁的半张脸诡异地抽搐着。{/n}“那就祝您狩猎愉快，哪怕这是您的最后一次。”

languages.text: {n}Janur vous regarde droit dans les yeux et le côté mutilé de son visage tressaute étrangement.{/n} « Je vous souhaite bonne chance, alors, pour votre dernière chasse. »
languages.original_text: {n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitching strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur vous regarde droit dans les yeux et le côté mutilé de son visage tressaute étrangement.{/n} « Je vous souhaite bonne chance, alors, pour votre dernière chasse. »

languages.text: {n}Janur sieht dir in die Augen. Die entstellte Seite seines Gesichtes zuckt seltsam.{/n} "Na dann, viel Glück auf der Jagd, obschon es Eure letzte sein wird."
languages.original_text: {n}Janur looks you in the eye, the mutilated side of his face twitching strangely.{/n} "Well then, good luck on the hunt, even if it is your last."
